problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: If Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
